name: @microsoft/msfs-wtg3000-common
description: Working Title MSFS G3000 Common Library

scripts.build: npm run build:compile && npm run build:rollup && npm run build:npm
scripts.build:rollup: robocopy html_ui/Shared *.css build /s & npx rollup -c rollup.config.mjs
scripts.build:npm: copy html_ui\Shared\package.json.src dist\package.json /y && cd dist && npm pack

author: Working Title Simulations, LLC
